meaning: n.高视阔步,支柱,压杆vi.大摇大摆地走,肿胀vt.支撑,炫耀
examples: One strut had fractured and been crudely repaired in several places.
Peacocks strut in the surrounding meadow.
When you strut your stuff, you're not being a show-off.
Cobbler craves cranberries, is known for his strut, and enjoys the musical stylings of Carly Simon.
Later Lenny Bruce cracks his despairing jokes and much later Mick Jagger performs his devil strut.
